title: Google Gemma 3 12B now available on Mosaic AI Model Serving
body:
Google Gemma 3 12B is now available on Mosaic AI Model Serving as a Databricks-hosted foundation model. See [Supported foundation models on Model Serving](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/foundation-model-overview).

Gemma 3 12B model supports text inputs for the following Model Serving features:

* Foundation Model APIs pay-per-token.
* Foundation Model APIs provisioned throughput.
* AI Functions. Both real time inference and batch inference workloads are supported.

ref_links.text: Supported foundation models on Model Serving
